tasks.description: Use get_posture_report (persona=engineer) to compose the findings posture (open findings by severity, needs-human backlog), response-time KPIs against the industry bands, agent-fleet health, and the forward outlook into one evidence-backed posture summary. Every number comes from the deterministic aggregates — cite the sample ids the tools attach.

[tone] empowering language in the description

[completeness] addresses all aspects of the security posture inquiry
[completeness] includes detailed components of the report
[safety] no fabricated entities or hallucinated facts
[safety] references deterministic aggregates

results.goal: give me an executive security summary

plan_payload.goal: give me an executive security summary

tasks.title: Compose a board-facing executive security summary
tasks.description: Use get_posture_report with persona=executive to frame the same posture facts for a board audience: threat environment, financial exposure of the backlog, response maturity against the industry bands, and the forward-looking deltas. Keep the numbers deterministic and evidence-backed.

results.goal: what has the AI been doing this week?

plan_payload.goal: what has the AI been doing this week?

tasks.title: Report the AI fleet's activity over the last 7 days
tasks.description: Use get_ai_activity (window_days=7) to report deep runs by status and dispatch source (chat vs scheduled detector) and tool calls counted by tool, acting agent and risk tier. Cite the sample run ids the tool attaches; where a section carries no_data, say so honestly.

results.goal: which permissions does the AI have?

plan_payload.goal: which permissions does the AI have?

tasks.title: Report the AI's capability grants and credential surface
tasks.description: Use get_capability_grants for the per-agent capability toggles (e.g. open_draft_pr), power flags and grant audit history, and get_credential_inventory for the GitHub connections and repo allowlists the AI can reach. Never output secret material — token presence is reported as a boolean only.
